title: Spring Cleaning 大扫除
scene: 全家人一起做大扫除，迎接新年。

lines.en: Today is spring cleaning day. Everyone needs to help!
lines.zh: 今天是大扫除日。每个人都要帮忙！

lines.en: OK, Mom. What should I do?
Can you wipe the windows in your room?
lines.zh: 你能擦一下你房间的窗户吗？

lines.en: Here you go. Use some water and soap.
The windows are so dirty. When did we last clean them?
lines.zh: 窗户好脏。我们上次擦是什么时候？

lines.en: It has been a while. That is why we need spring cleaning!
lines.zh: 有一段时间了。所以我们需要大扫除！

lines.en: My windows look so clean now!
Great job! Can you also help me move the sofa?
lines.zh: 做得好！你能帮我挪一下沙发吗？

lines.en: No problem. Let me clean under the sofa too!
lines.zh: 没问题。让我把沙发下面也打扫一下！
